Variables.Name: FilterWidth
Variables.Description: scalar, to clamp the Levels at pixel level, can be computed like this: max(length(ddx(Position)), length(ddy(Position))

Variables.Name: Scale
Variables.Description: can also be done with a multiply on the Position

Variables.Name: Quality
Variables.Description: Lower numbers are faster and lower quality, higher numbers are slower and higher quality

Variables.Name: NoiseFunction
Variables.Description: Noise function, affects performance and look

Variables.Name: bTurbulence
Variables.Description: How multiple frequencies are getting combined

Variables.Name: Levels
Variables.Description: 1 = fast but little detail, .. larger numbers cost more performance

Variables.Name: LevelScale
Variables.Description: usually 2 but higher values allow efficient use of few levels

Variables.Name: bTiling
Variables.Description: Whether to use tiling noise pattern, useful for baking to seam-free repeating textures

Variables.Name: RepeatSize
Variables.Description: How many units in each tile (if Tiling is on)
